case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCSICO VS WANG, RONG-WEI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCSICO AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, RONG-WEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WANG, RONG-WEI
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-29-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-15-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-15-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-17-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-17-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-21-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCSICO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WANG, RONG-WEI $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,035.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO WANG, RONG-WEI RETURNED TO COURT ATTEMPTED- NOT KNOWN.
